message:
test(tailer): add LabRuntime deterministic schedule exploration tests (ft-124z4)

Add tailer_labruntime.rs integration tests using asupersync's LabRuntime
for deterministic schedule exploration of tailer concurrency and channel
semantics. Tests use Budget-controlled exploration with CountingYieldSource
to verify concurrent poll behavior, max-active bounds, and channel
delivery under controlled scheduling. Gated behind
#[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] to only run when the asupersync
runtime feature is active.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
